title: Fresh Broiled Vietnamese Tomatoes Salad
description: A light, quick salad featuring charred vine tomatoes tossed in a zesty limefish sauce dressing and topped with toasted sesame seeds.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to high and place a broiler pan or baking sheet in the oven.
Halve the vine tomatoes and drizzle them with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, season with salt and pepper, and arrange cut‑side down on the pan.
Broil the tomatoes for 4–5 minutes, or until the cut surfaces are lightly charred and the skins blister.
Remove the pan from the oven and let the tomatoes cool slightly.
In a small bowl whisk together lime juice, fish sauce, minced garlic, and chili flakes.
Transfer the broiled tomatoes to a serving bowl and pour the dressing over them, gently tossing to coat.
Scatter toasted sesame seeds and chopped cilantro over the salad for texture and freshness.
Serve immediately at room temperature or slightly chilled, as a light lunch or side dish.
